action.reasoning: Observation: Best so far is 0.0462 (CSRankNorm + 3 seeds). Recent CSZScoreNorm + 5 seeds gave 0.0447 — worse. CSRankNorm helps RankIC more. Analysis: To improve further: (1) revert to CSRankNorm; (2) try DropExtremeLabel + CSRankNorm; (3) ensemble more seeds. Also could try combining the CSRankNorm 3-seed predictions with CSZScoreNorm 5-seed — meta-ensemble. Let me retrain with CSRankNorm + DropExtremeLabel + more seeds (8) + slightly tweaked params for diversity. Decision: retrain with CSRankNorm, 7 seeds, lower lr=0.02, num_leaves variation across seeds for diversity.
